options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <port_list> # List of ports

options.name: -from_pin
options.description: Specifies the name of the input port of the driver cell that has an arc to the output port of the driver cell

options.name: -input_transition_fall
options.description: <fall_slew_value> Specifies the slew value for the falling signal at the input of the drive cell

options.name: -input_transition_rise
options.description: <rise_slew_value> Specifies the slew value for the rising signal at the input of the drive cell

options.name: -lib_cell
options.description: Specifies the name of the driver cell

options.name: -library
options.description: Specifies the name of the library that contains the driving cell

options.name: -multiply_by
options.description: Specifies a multiplier for the drive

options.name: -no_design_rule
options.description: Do not transfer design rules from the driving cell to the port

options.name: -pin
options.description: Specifies the name of the output port of the driver cell that drives the signal at the input port
